testcase.name: tests.base.test_client
testcase.error: .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/python.py:507: in importtestmodule mod = import_path( .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/pathlib.py:587: in import_path importlib.import_module(module_name) /opt/anaconda3/envs/SWA_Rep2/lib/python3.14/importlib/__init__.py:88: in import_module return _bootstrap._gcd_import(name[level:], package, level) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1398: in _gcd_import ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1371: in _find_and_load ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1342: in _find_and_load_unlocked ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:938: in _load_unlocked ??? .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/assertion/rewrite.py:197: in exec_module exec(co, module.__dict__) tests/base/test_client.py:1: in <module> from rest_client.base import BearerTokenAuth, endpoint, SwaggerApiConfiguration rest_client/base/__init__.py:2: in <module> from .client import Client rest_client/base/client.py:9: in <module> from rest_client.base.util import fill_query_params rest_client/base/util.py:1: in <module> from rest_client.base.config import RequestConfig E File "/Users/namugo/Desktop/대학대학/1. testcase.name: tests.base.test_endpoint_config
